site.name: agents.txt Standard
site.description: The open specification for AI agent capability declarations. Layer 4 of the agent-readiness stack.

mcp.description: Exposes the agents.txt spec as structured resources: sections, directive reference, examples, and the JSON schema for agents.json.

skills.description: Guides a developer through adopting the agents.txt standard on their own website: walks the spec, picks an adoption path (hand-write, generator, or library), and validates the result.
